languages.text: "Поход за Себерианом постоянно откладывается. Неприятная гипотеза возникла на пересечении моих мыслительных координат: некоторые члены экспедиции не желают его возвращения. Если курс событий продолжит развиваться в том же векторе, я отправлюсь за ним сам. Шанс сбиться с пути мал, ибо Себериан планировал оставлять за собой следы".

traits.locale_text: "Поход за Себерианом постоянно откладывается. Неприятная гипотеза возникла на пересечении моих мыслительных координат: некоторые члены экспедиции не желают его возвращения. Если курс событий продолжит развиваться в том же векторе, я отправлюсь за ним сам. Шанс сбиться с пути мал, ибо Себериан планировал оставлять за собой следы".

languages.text: "The effort to recover Seberian has been postponed several times now. An unpleasant hypothesis has formed at the intersection of my mental paths: not all expedition members desire his return. If events continue along the present vector, I must go and retrieve him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."
languages.original_text: "Поход за Себерианом постоянно откладывается. Неприятная гипотеза возникла на пересечении моих мыслительных координат: некоторые члены экспедиции не желают его возвращения. Если курс событий продолжит развиваться в том же векторе, я отправлюсь за ним сам. Шанс сбиться с пути мал, ибо Себериан планировал оставлять за собой следы".

traits.locale_text: "The excursion to recover Seberian has been postponed several times by now. An unpleasant hypothesis sprung up at the intersection of my mental coordinates: not all expedition members wish for his return. If the course of events continues along its present vector, I will go and get him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

If the course of events continues along its present vector, I will go and get him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

"The effort to recover Seberian has been postponed several times now. An unpleasant hypothesis has formed at the intersection of my mental paths: not all expedition members desire his return. If events continue along the present vector, I must go and retrieve him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

"The effort to recover Seberian has been postponed several times now. An unpleasant hypothesis has formed at the intersection of my mental paths: not all expedition members desire his return. If events continue along the present vector, I must go and retrieve him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

languages.text: “营救塞贝里安的行动目前已数次被推迟。我的思维路径交汇处，形成了一个令人不安的假说：并非所有远征队成员都希望他回来。若事态继续沿当前轨迹发展，我只能亲自去找回他。我迷失方向的概率很低，因为塞贝里安之前有打算沿途留下标记。”
languages.original_text: "The effort to recover Seberian has been postponed several times now. An unpleasant hypothesis has formed at the intersection of my mental paths: not all expedition members desire his return. If events continue along the present vector, I must go and retrieve him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

traits.locale_text: “营救塞贝里安的行动目前已数次被推迟。我的思维路径交汇处，形成了一个令人不安的假说：并非所有远征队成员都希望他回来。若事态继续沿当前轨迹发展，我只能亲自去找回他。我迷失方向的概率很低，因为塞贝里安之前有打算沿途留下标记。”

languages.text: «Los intentos por recuperar a Seberian se han pospuesto ya en repetidas ocasiones. Una hipótesis incómoda se ha formado en la intersección de mis sendas mentales: no todos los miembros de la expedición anhelan su regreso. Si los eventos continúan desarrollándose por el vector presente, deberé ir en su busca yo mismo. La probabilidad de que pierda mi camino es baja, ya que Seberian planeaba dejar marcas a su paso».
languages.original_text: "The effort to recover Seberian has been postponed several times now. An unpleasant hypothesis has formed at the intersection of my mental paths: not all expedition members desire his return. If events continue along the present vector, I must go and retrieve him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

traits.locale_text: «Los intentos por recuperar a Seberian se han pospuesto ya en repetidas ocasiones. Una hipótesis incómoda se ha formado en la intersección de mis sendas mentales: no todos los miembros de la expedición anhelan su regreso. Si los eventos continúan desarrollándose por el vector presente, deberé ir en su busca yo mismo. La probabilidad de que pierda mi camino es baja, ya que Seberian planeaba dejar marcas a su paso».

languages.text: « La mission de recherche pour retrouver Seberian a déjà été repoussée à plusieurs reprises. Mon cheminement mental a produit une hypothèse des plus déplaisantes : certains des membres de l'expédition ne souhaitent pas son retour. Si les événements continuent de suivre le vecteur actuel, je devrai partir moi-même à sa recherche. Il est peu probable que je me perde en chemin, puisque Seberian entendait laisser des marques derrière lui. »
languages.original_text: "The effort to recover Seberian has been postponed several times now. An unpleasant hypothesis has formed at the intersection of my mental paths: not all expedition members desire his return. If events continue along the present vector, I must go and retrieve him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

traits.locale_text: « La mission de recherche pour retrouver Seberian a déjà été repoussée à plusieurs reprises. Mon cheminement mental a produit une hypothèse des plus déplaisantes : certains des membres de l'expédition ne souhaitent pas son retour. Si les événements continuent de suivre le vecteur actuel, je devrai partir moi-même à sa recherche. Il est peu probable que je me perde en chemin, puisque Seberian entendait laisser des marques derrière lui. »

languages.text: "Seberian'ı kurtarma çabası, şimdiye dek birkaç kez ertelendi. Zihinsel yollarımın kesişim noktasında nahoş bir hipotez şekillendi: Keşif üyelerinin hepsi onun dönmesini arzulamıyor. Olaylar mevcut vektör doğrultusunda devam ederse gidip onu kendim almalıyım. Seberian arkasında işaretler bırakmayı planladığı için yolumu kaybetme olasılığım düşük."
languages.original_text: "The effort to recover Seberian has been postponed several times now. An unpleasant hypothesis has formed at the intersection of my mental paths: not all expedition members desire his return. If events continue along the present vector, I must go and retrieve him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ı kurtarma çabası, şimdiye dek birkaç kez ertelendi. Zihinsel yollarımın kesişim noktasında nahoş bir hipotez şekillendi: Keşif üyelerinin hepsi onun dönmesini arzulamıyor. Olaylar mevcut vektör doğrultusunda devam ederse gidip onu kendim almalıyım. Seberian arkasında işaretler bırakmayı planladığı için yolumu kaybetme olasılığım düşük."

languages.text: "Seberians Bergung wurde mittlerweile mehrere Male verschoben. Am Schnittpunkt meiner mentalen Prozesse hat sich eine unerfreuliche Hypothese gebildet: Nicht alle Mitglieder der Expedition wollen, dass er zurückkehrt. Sollten die Geschehnisse weiter dem aktuellen Vektor folgen, muss ich ihn wohl selbst retten. Die Wahrscheinlichkeit, von meinem Weg abzukommen, ist gering, da Seberian Markierungen hinterlassen wollte."
languages.original_text: "The effort to recover Seberian has been postponed several times now. An unpleasant hypothesis has formed at the intersection of my mental paths: not all expedition members desire his return. If events continue along the present vector, I must go and retrieve him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

traits.locale_text: "Seberians Bergung wurde mittlerweile mehrere Male verschoben. Am Schnittpunkt meiner mentalen Prozesse hat sich eine unerfreuliche Hypothese gebildet: Nicht alle Mitglieder der Expedition wollen, dass er zurückkehrt. Sollten die Geschehnisse weiter dem aktuellen Vektor folgen, muss ich ihn wohl selbst retten. Die Wahrscheinlichkeit, von meinem Weg abzukommen, ist gering, da Seberian Markierungen hinterlassen wollte."

languages.text: 「セベリアンの奪還の試みは、これまでに幾度も延期されてきた。私の心的経路の交点に、不快な仮説が形成された――遠征隊の全員が、彼の帰還を望んでいるわけではない。事態が現在のベクトルのまま進むなら、私自身が彼を連れ戻しに行かねばならない。道に迷う可能性は小さい。セベリアンが目印を残しておく計画だったからだ」
languages.original_text: "The effort to recover Seberian has been postponed several times now. An unpleasant hypothesis has formed at the intersection of my mental paths: not all expedition members desire his return. If events continue along the present vector, I must go and retrieve him myself. The likelihood of losing my way is small, as Seberian was planning on leaving marks behind."

traits.locale_text: 「セベリアンの奪還の試みは、これまでに幾度も延期されてきた。私の心的経路の交点に、不快な仮説が形成された――遠征隊の全員が、彼の帰還を望んでいるわけではない。事態が現在のベクトルのまま進むなら、私自身が彼を連れ戻しに行かねばならない。道に迷う可能性は小さい。セベリアンが目印を残しておく計画だったからだ」
